div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
THE BIG IDEA — a shared whiteboard of answers
(why having MORE workers can save work)

div.style: color: rgb(122, 62, 18) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(51, 66, 79) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
The tool (slow):
actually goes and looks it up.
Costs a real round-trip.

div.style: color: rgb(58, 42, 102) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
SHARED WHITEBOARD
(the kernel's result cache)
'SFO to JFK = UA123, DL456'
written down for everyone

div.style: color: rgb(122, 62, 18) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Worker 2 later asks
the SAME thing:
'flights SFO to JFK?'

div.style: color: rgb(122, 62, 18) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Worker 3 later asks
the SAME thing too

div.style: color: rgb(28, 82, 48) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Kernel: 'Already on the whiteboard!'
Hands back the answer instantly.
NO slow tool trip. A round-trip DELETED.

div.style: color: rgb(27, 58, 102) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Every worker after the FIRST one
gets that answer for free.
=> more workers reading the same things
=> more saved trips
